name: Проверка видимости без testid: idea_card_progress_bar
description:
Тест 4: Проверка видимости элементов без data-testid.

Для каждого элемента:
1. Дождаться загрузки футера
2. Проверить видимость элемента
descriptionHtml:
Тест 4: Проверка видимости элементов без data-testid.

Для каждого элемента:

  1. Дождаться загрузки футера
  2. Проверить видимость элемента
statusMessage: playwright._impl._errors.TimeoutError: Locator.wait_for: Timeout 10000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for locator(".idea-card__progress-bar").first to be visible 24 × locator resolved to hidden
statusTrace:
dashboard_page_visible_test = name = 'idea_card_progress_bar', locator = '.idea-card__progress-bar' @pytest.mark.smoke @pytest.mark.regression @pytest.mark.visible @pytest.mark.parametrize( "name,locator", [ ("dashboard_main", ".dashboard__main"), ("dashboard_content", ".dashboard__content"), ("stories", ".stories"), ("overview_statistics", ".overview-statistics"), ("story_items", ".stories-item"), ("overview_statistics_tiles", ".overview-statistics__tile"), ("banner_actions", ".banner-layout__actions"), ("loyalty_program_title", ".overview-panel__title"), ("loyalty_card", ".loyalty-card"), ("loyalty_card_hero", ".loyalty-card__hero"), ("loyalty_card_tier_sub", ".loyalty-card__tier-sub"), ("loyalty_card_earning", ".loyalty-card__earning"), ("loyalty_card_progress_section", ".loyalty-card__progress-section"), ("loyalty_card_tiers", ".loyalty-card__tiers"), ("ideas_header", ".ideas__head"), ("ideas_title", ".ideas__title"), ("ideas_action", ".ideas__action"), ("idea_card_media", ".idea-card__media"), ("idea_card_body", ".idea-card__body"), ("idea_card_head", ".idea-card__head"), ("idea_card_title", ".idea-card__title"), ("idea_card_meta", ".idea-card__meta"), ("idea_card_rate_row", ".idea-card__rate-row"), ("idea_card_rate", ".idea-card__rate"), ("idea_card_progress", ".idea-card__progress"), ("idea_card_progress_bar", ".idea-card__progress-bar"), ("idea_card_footer", ".idea-card__footer"), ("idea_card_funded", ".idea-card__funded"), ("banner_bg_image", ".banner-layout__bg-image"), ], ) def test_dashboard_element_visible_by_selector(dashboard_page_visible_test: DashboardPage, name, locator): """ Тест 4: Проверка видимости элементов без data-testid. Для каждого элемента: 1. Дождаться загрузки футера 2. Проверить видимость элемента """ allure.dynamic.title(f"Проверка видимости без testid: {name}") dashboard_page_visible_test.wait_for_component("footer") > dashboard_page_visible_test.check_element_visible_by_selector(locator, name) tests/test_elements_visible/test_dashboard.py:136: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ pages/base_page.py:51: in check_element_visible_by_selector locator.wait_for(state="visible", timeout=10000) /opt/hostedtoolcache/Python/3.13.14/x64/lib/python3.13/site-packages/playwright/sync_api/_generated.py:20048: in wait_for self._sync( /opt/hostedtoolcache/Python/3.13.14/x64/lib/python3.13/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_locator.py:741: in wait_for await self._frame.wait_for_selector( /opt/hostedtoolcache/Python/3.13.14/x64/lib/python3.13/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_frame.py:372: in wait_for_selector await self._channel.send( /opt/hostedtoolcache/Python/3.13.14/x64/lib/python3.13/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_connection.py:69: in send return await self._connection.wrap_api_call( _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ self = cb = . at 0x7f61f35f2b60> is_internal = False, title = None async def wrap_api_call( self, cb: Callable[[], Any], is_internal: bool = False, title: str = None ) -> Any: if self._api_zone.get(): return await cb() task = asyncio.current_task(self._loop) st: List[inspect.FrameInfo] = getattr( task, "__pw_stack__", None ) or inspect.stack(0) parsed_st = _extract_stack_trace_information_from_stack(st, is_internal, title) self._api_zone.set(parsed_st) try: return await cb() except Exception as error: > raise rewrite_error(error, f"{parsed_st['apiName']}: {error}") from None E playwright._impl._errors.TimeoutError: Locator.wait_for: Timeout 10000ms exceeded.
